runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.83) when fifth over 295m at this track in a Class 4. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from eight starts. Expected to go close.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 295m in 17.18. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 295m at this track at Class 3 level. On best form is more than capable. Include on best form.

runners.formComment: Finished second last time (22.51) over 390m at Ascot Park. Heading in the right direction and well placed to be very competitive.

runners.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Ascot Park to win by 1.5 lengths in 22.84, beating Mitcham Julian. Last start finished last on April 9 over 295m at this track behind Opawa Weatherley beaten 15 lengths (17.78) in a Class 4. Others preferred on this occasion.

runners.formComment: Resumes from a three-and-a-half months spell and was in the minors at only other fresh up run, finishing third at big odds over 295m at this track. Has had a solo trial (17.34) on this track over 295m. Needs it easier.
